revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-3-095

Alternative terms: B-scan, B-scope, Range bearing display

A radar display in which an echo appears on the screen as a bright spot whose rectangular coordinates indicate the range and bearing of the object.

Reference: B.S.

{{IALAFooter}}
